meta.title: AI Dev 25 | Panel Discussion: Building AI Application in 2025
meta.description:
What will it take to build impactful AI applications in 2025 and beyond?

In the panel discussion at AI Dev 25, moderated by Laurence Moroney, leading voices in AI from industry and academia come together to explore the future of AI development. The conversation covers emerging trends, practical challenges, and the opportunities shaping the next wave of AI applications.

Panelists include:
– Michele Catasta (President, Replit)
– Percy Liang (Associate Professor, Stanford University)
– Roman Chernin (Co-founder and CBO, Nebius)
– Thomas Wolf (Co-founder & Chief Science Officer, Hugging Face)

From infrastructure and model development to deployment and ethics, this discussion offers valuable insights for developers, researchers, and anyone building at the frontier of AI.
